title: DuckDuckGo Web Search Skill Creator and Activator
job:
Create a new DuckDuckGo web search skill and activate it.

Follow these steps:

1. Create the skill directory structure:
   ```bash
   mkdir -p skills/duckduckgo
   ```

2. Create `skills/duckduckgo/SKILL.md` with this content:
   ```
---
name: duckduckgo
description: Web search using DuckDuckGo API. Returns search results with titles, snippets, and URLs. No API key required.
---

# DuckDuckGo Search

Search the web using DuckDuckGo's free Instant Answer API.

## Usage

```bash
skills/duckduckgo/search.sh <query> [num_results] [safe_search]
```

- `query` (required) — Search term
- `num_results` (optional, default: 10) — Number of results to return
- `safe_search` (optional, default: 1) — 1 for on, 0 for off

## Examples

```bash
skills/duckduckgo/search.sh "node.js best practices"
skills/duckduckgo/search.sh "ai trends 2025" 5
```

Returns JSON array with title, snippet, and URL for each result.
   ```

3. Create `skills/duckduckgo/search.sh` with this content:
   ```bash
#!/bin/bash
# DuckDuckGo web search script

QUERY="$1"
NUM_RESULTS="${2:-10}"
SAFE_SEARCH="${3:-1}"

if [ -z "$QUERY" ]; then
  echo "Usage: search.sh <query> [num_results] [safe_search]"
  exit 1
fi

# Call DuckDuckGo Instant Answer API
RESULTS=$(curl -s "https://api.duckduckgo.com/" \
  -G \
  -d "q=$QUERY" \
  -d "format=json" \
  -d "pretty=1" \
  -d "no_redirect=1" \
  -d "safe=$SAFE_SEARCH")

# Parse and format results
echo "$RESULTS" | jq -r ".Results[] | select(.Title != \"\") | {title: .Title, url: .FirstURL} | @json" | head -n "$NUM_RESULTS"
   ```

4. Make the script executable:
   ```bash
   chmod +x skills/duckduckgo/search.sh
   ```

5. Activate the skill by creating a symlink:
   ```bash
   ln -s ../duckduckgo skills/active/duckduckgo
   ```

6. Test the skill with real queries:
   ```bash
   skills/duckduckgo/search.sh "python programming"
   skills/duckduckgo/search.sh "latest AI news" 5
   ```

7. Verify the symlink was created:
   ```bash
   ls -la skills/active/ | grep duckduckgo
   ```

8. If tests pass, commit all changes with message: "Add DuckDuckGo web search skill"

If any test fails, fix the issue before committing.
